rules.rule_text:
title: Malicious QakBot Dropped File Creation (Sysmon)
id: 8e401ffe-ca9b-4bb2-87aa-8e285811d43f
status: experimental
description: Detects creation of files potentially associated with QakBot initial
  infection, documented by Adithya Chandra and Sushant Kumar Arya of Trellix in August
  2022.
references:
- https://www.trellix.com/en-us/about/newsroom/stories/research/demystifying-qbot-malware.html
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/17
tags:
- attack.initial_access
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1566
- attack.t1027
- attack.t1553
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
    - .html
    - .zip
    - .iso
    - .lnk
    TargetFilename|re: .*TXRTN_[0-9]{7}\..*
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
